title: The New Stack RSS Article Item
description: An article item from The New Stack RSS feed (RSS 2.0 with Dublin Core and content:encoded extensions).

link.description: Canonical URL of the article on thenewstack.io.

guid.description: Globally unique identifier for the item (WordPress post URL or ID-based URL).

pubDate.description: Publication date in RFC 2822 format (e.g., Sat, 02 May 2026 16:00:00 +0000).

categories.description: Array of content category tags (e.g., Cloud Native, DevOps, AI Agents).

description.description: Brief excerpt of the article, may include HTML with featured image.

content.description: Full HTML article content from the content:encoded element.
